detections.text: First step is to get a bowl of warm water.
You can dye it whatever color you want.
Then add some guar gum powder.
And you only need a small spoonful of this.
And try to break up all these big chunks of guar gum powder.
After mixing it thoroughly, we're still going to have some chunks of guar gum left.
So we're going to use a strainer to take everything out.
I made a little bit of a mess.
Now add some slime activator and mix it thoroughly.
And here we have our finished water slime.
Let's take it out of the spool.
It's so jiggly, but it like doesn't stain anything.
